description_long: This is a dark-colored, oval kitchen or utility sink with a single deep basin and an integrated draining board to one side. The sink features a high-arched, gooseneck faucet mounted at the rear, positioned above the basin for easy access. The draining board has a series of parallel grooves to channel water back into the basin, and the basin itself is smooth and rounded with a visible central drain. The material appears to be a glossy, enameled metal or composite, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. There is a small overflow hole located near the top of the basin, providing extra drainage safety. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for installation in urban environments such as public wash areas, garages, or outdoor kitchens.
description: A glossy, dark oval sink with a single deep basin, integrated draining board, and a high-arched faucet. The design is modern and functional, with a central drain and overflow hole.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the deep basin, faucet, and overflow hole clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the draining board and the height of the faucet.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the draining board's grooves and the faucet's attachment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the basin's depth and the smooth transition to the draining board.
